scripts.dev: bun run prisma:generate && bun run db:migrate && bun --env-file=.env --watch src/server.ts
scripts.build: bun run prisma:generate && tsc -p tsconfig.json && cp -R src/generated dist/generated
scripts.prisma:schema-sql: node scripts/check-schema-sync.mjs && DATABASE_URL=file:/tmp/mg-schema-dummy.db prisma migrate diff --from-empty --to-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.sqlite.prisma --script
